description: Pausing on the male adventurous spirit, this Reeload fragrance for men, from reebok has a musky yet floral aroma for the alpha male. Bottled in a delectable jet black flask, this eau de toilette has tones of lemon, grapefruit and rose. Quantity: 100 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
